structured_payload_candidate.title: Cooling Zone State Airflow Setpoint Mapping
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: When the Zone State Is Cooling
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The cooling-loop output is mapped to the active primary airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Map cooling-loop output to active primary airflow setpoint from minimum endpoint to cooling maximum endpoint. If SAT > room temperature, limit active primary airflow setpoint to no higher than minimum endpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: a. The cooling-loop output shall be mapped to the active airflow setpoint from the minimum endpoint to the cooling maximum endpoint. 1. If supply air temperature from the air handler is greater than room temperature, the active primary airflow setpoint shall be no higher than the minimum endpoint.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Zone State Discharge Temperature Reset (0-50% Heating Loop)
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit – Variable-Volume Fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: From 0% to 50% heating loop output, reset discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone State is Heating, heating loop output 0% to 50%
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Reset discharge temperature setpoint linearly from current AHU SAT setpoint (at 0%) to MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint (at 50%).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: c. From 0% to 50%, the Heating Loop output shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
